textByHashes.e4ca5dca56802f3a699196c4bd2a027eba83a553: Don't expect me to deal with the likes of you.
textByHashes.f77b0f2fb97dc76011a198dbc2d914dba96efe6a: If you're planning on fighting me for a set of my armour, I'm afraid I'm not interested. The combat XP from fighting you isn't worthwhile. Get a Defence level of 20 first.
textByHashes.54aa7472c214db6fbf6cb0343474f600fb3e09de: Hello. Do you fancy a fight? It's just a bit of fun, so I can practice melee combat. I'll give you a piece of my armour if you win.
textByHashes.9eb09de8b62f585fd5af1ddcd1d3cf0045021f3c: Yes, I'm not interested in fancy magicks. We leave that namby-pamby stuff to the Arceuus weirdos. And no ranging either. We'll fight just with melee.
textByHashes.10202f21b2978c3b8e719937ebbf12539a6d6705: Remember, if you lose, you'll probably drop some items, and you probably won't get them back again. Just run away if you want to stop the fight.
textByHashes.c16795f1456e06cb99def038c4a7f52c8c617ca0: In that case you probably shouldn't be hanging around an army camp.
textByHashes.0397f0f64f083377f30636584832f6a2facb0659: Let me know if you change your mind. I need combat practice if I'm ever going to level up.
textByHashes.ce88740e162da3ae0f2f9d37c0178902b530d310: Fancy another fight? The combat practice is good for me. I'll give you some more of my armour if you win.
textByHashes.993625c61a0ed1897a738ea06aacc6cd86e29a61: Let me know if you change your mind. The combat practice is good for me.
textByHashes.f5a1ef77798da9c2b004b01109a7f9b1dec366b7: Don't you already have a set of my armour?
textByHashes.d2422af6e13b78707154da9e66cf97106371e1ff: I'll be here if you ever change your mind.
